Listings

Explore the attractions that can anchor a memorable Africa trip.

Search safaris, coastlines, heritage sites, city gateways, deserts, and cultural routes, then open each listing for nearby stays, dining, timing, access, and partner booking links.

Image slot Attraction Bwindi Impenetrable National Park

Uganda • East Africa

Bwindi Impenetrable National Park

Mountain gorilla trekking in one of Africa’s most powerful forest landscapes.

★ 4.9 (842) From $700
Southwestern Uganda
View Details
Image slot Attraction Maasai Mara

Kenya • East Africa

Maasai Mara

Kenya’s classic safari icon for migration drama, predators, and broad savannah horizons.

★ 4.9 (1,384) From $95
Southwestern Kenya
View Details
Image slot Attraction Serengeti National Park

Tanzania • East Africa

Serengeti National Park

Vast migration landscapes, apex predators, and one of Africa’s strongest safari names.

★ 4.9 (1,196) From $110
Northern Tanzania
View Details
Image slot Attraction Cape Town

South Africa • Southern Africa

Cape Town

A design-led city with ocean views, wine access, and easy day trips.

★ 4.8 (1,675) From $20
Western Cape
View Details
Image slot Attraction Victoria Falls

Zimbabwe • Southern Africa

Victoria Falls

The classic waterfall gateway for rainforest walks, river activities, and onward safari routing.

★ 4.7 (882) From $28
Zimbabwe
View Details
Image slot Attraction Marrakech And Atlas

Morocco • Northern Africa

Marrakech & Atlas Gateway

A flexible route of medina culture, gardens, riads, and day trips into the Atlas foothills.

★ 4.7 (1,222) From $16
Morocco
View Details
Image slot Attraction Murchison Falls National Park

Uganda • East Africa

Murchison Falls National Park

Uganda’s flagship Nile-and-savannah park with boat safaris, game drives, and the dramatic falls.

★ 4.7 (615) From $45
Northern Uganda
View Details
Image slot Attraction Amboseli National Park

Kenya • East Africa

Amboseli National Park

Big-elephant country with unforgettable Kilimanjaro backdrops.

★ 4.8 (724) From $70
Southern Kenya
View Details
Image slot Attraction Zanzibar

Tanzania • East Africa

Zanzibar

A safari-and-coast favorite built around Stone Town, beaches, and slower Indian Ocean pacing.

★ 4.7 (983) From $35
Indian Ocean coast of Tanzania
View Details
Image slot Attraction Volcanoes National Park

Rwanda • East Africa

Volcanoes National Park

Premium gorilla trekking with short transfer times from Kigali.

★ 4.8 (538) From $1,500
Northern Rwanda
View Details
Image slot Attraction Lalibela

Ethiopia • East Africa

Lalibela

Rock-hewn churches and one of Africa’s most compelling heritage landscapes.

★ 4.6 (311) From $28
Northern Ethiopia

Ghana • West Africa

Cape Coast & Kakum

Atlantic heritage castles paired with rainforest canopy walks.

Sine-Saloum Delta

A softer Senegal route of waterways, birdlife, and lodge-based slow travel.

Image slot Attraction Ouidah And Ganvie

Benin • West Africa

Ouidah & Ganvié

A compact heritage route linking Atlantic history with the famous stilt village.

★ 4.5 (176) From $26
Southern Benin

Tokeh & River No. 2 Beach

An easy Sierra Leone coast escape with striking beaches and a laid-back mood.

Image slot Attraction Sal Island

Cabo Verde • West Africa

Sal Island

Reliable winter sun, beaches, and water sports.

Kruger National Park

A major Big Five safari zone with wide lodge choice and strong self-drive or guided options.

Mpumalanga and Limpopo

Image slot Attraction Okavango Delta

Botswana • Southern Africa

Okavango Delta

One of Africa’s most exclusive safari ecosystems with mokoro channels and floodplain camps.

★ 4.9 (341) From $550
Northern Botswana

Image slot Attraction Namib Desert

Namibia • Southern Africa

Namib Desert

Towering dunes, cinematic desert light, and an unmatched sense of open space.

Sahara Dunes

Cairo & Giza

Tunis & Sidi Bou Said

Algeria • Northern Africa

Djanet & Tassili n’Ajjer

A saharan expedition route of rock art, desert geology, and extreme remoteness.

★ 4.8 (97) From $180
